company.name: Tenax Therapeutics
company.subtitle: Tenax Therapeutics · Oral levosimendan PH-HFpEF · LEVEL Ph3 topline May 1, 2026 · first-in-class indication

assets.name: Oral levosimendan (TNX-103) — calcium sensitizer + K-ATP opener
assets.stage: Phase 3 (LEVEL topline May 1, 2026; LEVEL-2 long-term enrolling)

indications.name: PH-HFpEF (pulmonary hypertension with HF preserved EF)

us.reachPct.note: First-in-class for PH-HFpEF if approved 2027; ~8% peak reach (~40K patients) of ~500K severe symptomatic addressable pool. No competing approved oral therapy in this indication.

us.priceK.note: $30K/yr WAC modeled (specialty cardiology oral chronic); benchmarked vs Adempas/PAH branded class ($30-60K) but priced lower for HFpEF setting where payor scrutiny is intense.

us.wtpPct.note: 40% -- payors will require RHC + echo confirmation of PH overlap; cardiology specialty channel; early launch will be slow given novel indication.

eu.reachPct.note: 4% -- EU launch 2028+ following EMA filing; HTA bodies skeptical of PH-HFpEF as separable indication.

row.reachPct.note: 1% -- Japan PMDA potential 2029; rest ROW negligible.

mega_bear.narrative: LEVEL Phase 3 misses primary endpoint — single-asset binary failure
events: ✗ LEVEL primary 6MWD or composite endpoint not significant
✗ Mechanism dispute on troponin-C calcium sensitization in HFpEF
✗ LEVEL-2 trial halted; company forced to dilute heavily
→ Stock collapses to cash floor (~$5-6/share post-dilution)

bear.narrative: LEVEL hits but signal weaker than expected; LEVEL-2 needed for approval
events: △ LEVEL primary endpoint met but effect size modest (6MWD +20-25m)
△ FDA requires LEVEL-2 confirmation before BLA acceptance
△ Launch delayed to 2029; commercial uptake slow given HFpEF complexity
→ Single-product orphan-cardio franchise, modest commercial outcome

base.narrative: LEVEL clearly positive; BLA path opens; LEVEL-2 confirmatory data 2027
events: ✓ LEVEL primary endpoint met (6MWD +30-40m, p<0.01)
✓ Clean safety profile sustained at 6mo + 12mo
✓ FDA accepts BLA H2 2027; launch H2 2028
✓ Commercial ramp $50-150M Years 1-3 (cardiology specialty)

bull.narrative: LEVEL exceeds expectations; LEVEL-2 positive; cardiology adoption strong
events: ✓ LEVEL +50m+ 6MWD with reduced HF hospitalizations
✓ LEVEL-2 long-term endpoints positive 2027
✓ Cardiology guideline inclusion 2028
✓ Peak revenue $400-600M as PH-HFpEF first-in-class

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Levosimendan becomes PH-HFpEF standard of care + label expansion to other PH groups
events: ✓ Levosimendan dominates PH-HFpEF, peak $1B+ globally
✓ Label expansion to Group 1 PAH or Group 3 PH (lung disease)
✓ Big pharma takeout (Bayer, Merck, J&J cardiology pipeline build-out)
→ Takeout at $40-60/share

catalysts.title: LEVEL Phase 3 topline (oral levosimendan PH-HFpEF)
catalysts._rationale: LEVEL fully enrolled 2025; topline guided May 1, 2026

catalysts.title: LEVEL-2 enrollment update (long-term outcomes Ph3)
catalysts._rationale: LEVEL-2 long-term placebo-controlled; enrollment guided through 2026-27

catalysts.title: Levosimendan BLA submission
catalysts._rationale: Conditional on LEVEL success; company guides BLA H1 2027
